home.taglineSub: Document, share and track the architectural choices that matter.
home.feature1Desc: Record the context, options considered and consequences of each technical decision.
home.feature2Desc: Group decisions by project and keep everything tidy and accessible.
home.feature3Desc: Collaborate with your team and keep everyone aligned on the choices made.

auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm registration!

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits: from Free to try to Ultra for teams.

dashboard.startDocumenting: Start documenting your team's technical decisions.
dashboard.noDecisions: No decisions. Create a project and add the first decision.
dashboard.noProjects: No projects. Create one to group decisions.
dashboard.step1: Create a project — Group decisions by application or service.
dashboard.step2: Document a decision — Context, options and final decision.
dashboard.step3: Share with the team — The "why" behind technical choices.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage your projects and their decisions
projects.noProjectsHint: Start by creating your first project to organize decisions.
projects.name: Project name

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.subtitle: All documented technical decisions
decisions.createFirstProject: To create decisions, you must first create at least one project.
decisions.newSubtitle: Generate the decision with AI by pasting text or enter it manually.
decisions.copySubtitle: Fields prefilled from the selected decision. Edit and save to create the new decision.
decisions.noDecisionsCreate: No decisions. Create one to get started.
decisions.noResultsFilters: No results with the selected filters. Try changing search or tags.
decisions.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Adopt Next.js as frontend framework
decisions.contextPlaceholder: Describe the problem or situation that led to this decision...
decisions.optionPlaceholder: e.g. Next.js - native SSR, great ecosystem
decisions.noOptions: No options. Click "Add option" to list the alternatives considered.
decisions.consequencesPlaceholder: Describe the positive and negative consequences of this decision...
decisions.tagHint: Type and choose from suggestions or press Enter to add.
decisions.noPr: No pull requests. Click "Add PR" to link one or more PRs to this decision.
decisions.noLinks: No links. Click "Add link" to add external references (RFC, docs, etc.).
decisions.selectProjectFirst: Select a project first to search for the decision this will supersede.
decisions.supersedesHint: Optional: indicate which decision this supersedes. The selected decision will be marked as "Superseded".
decisions.supersededNote: The chosen decision will be marked as "Superseded".
decisions.duplicateWarningBody: A decision with the same title already exists.
decisions.pastePlaceholder: Paste or type the content to generate a decision from...

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Manage members and invitations. Invited users will see all projects in the workspace.
workspace.createHint: With the Ultra plan you can create multiple workspaces to organize teams and projects.
workspace.upgradeForWorkspaces: To create more workspaces, upgrade to the
workspace.membersHint: Users invited to the workspace will see all projects. Manage invites and members here.
workspace.inviteUser: Invite a user to the workspace
workspace.inviteHint: Enter the email and share the link (valid 7 days). The invitee will see all projects in the workspace.

errors.name_update_failed: Unable to update name. Try again.
errors.role_update_failed: Unable to update role. Try again.
errors.only_owner_can_invite: Only the workspace owner can invite
errors.invite_pending_exists: A pending invitation for this email already exists
errors.login_to_accept: Sign in to accept the invitation
errors.invite_wrong_email: This invitation was sent to a different email. Sign in with the correct account.
errors.already_member: You are already a member of this workspace
errors.only_owner_revoke: Only the owner can revoke an invitation
